characters.name: Andrea
characters.description: Andreais a student atJuliet's public school. She seems to be friends withJuliet, seeing as they are seen talking to each other in the school hallway, and Juliet confides to her about her crush onMr. Carpenterand lying about Mr. Carpenter raping her. Her first appearance was inThat's What You Get For Trying To Kill Me.Her last appearance wasIt's Easy To Cry When This Much Cash Is Involved.Although,it is unknown whether Andrea found out about the scam or not. She is portrayed byChelsea Tavares.

characters.name: Andrew Martin
characters.description: Andrew MartinisSiobhan's husband, who becomes suspicious of his wife's new behavior. Andrew's behavior towardsBridget(playing Siobhan) changes during the first two episodes, although it seems as though Andrew was not completely loyal to Siobhan. He's alsoJuliet's father and a "friend" ofGemmaandHenry. Andrew is portrayed by Ioan Gruffudd.

characters.name: Becks Butler
characters.description: Becks Butleris the 3 year old son ofHenryandGemma Butler, and the identical twin brother ofDash. They first appeared with Henry inShut Up And Eat Your Bologna, however they have been mentioned several times throughout the series, and their first mention was inPilot. They also appear in a photo with Gemma as her phone's wallpaper. They have red hair, just like Gemma. Their names were revealed inIf You're Just An Evil Bitch Then Get Over It, when Henry comes home calling out for them.Tim Arbogastcalls child services and reports Henry as an unfit parent. They are then taken and live at Gemma's dad's house.

characters.name: Bodaway Macawi
characters.description: Bodaway Macawi is one of the main antagonists of the series. It is known that he owns a strip club in Wyoming, whereBridgetandMary Curtisused to work. He is wanted by the FBI for strangling one of his strippers, which Bridget witnessed. Throughout the series he also commits other crimes, such as kidnappingMalcolmand drugging him. InI'm The Good Twinhe breaks into the Martin's apartment and attacksSiobhan.Bridgetcomes in and shoots Bodaway in the chest when he attacks her. He pretends to be dead and pulls Bridget down and he strangles her but she shoots him in the head. He is portrayed by Zahn McClarnon.

characters.name: Bodaway Macawi

characters.name: Bridget Kelly
characters.description: Bridget Kellyis a recovering drug addict, lead character of the series and the identical twin sister ofSiobhan Martin. Their parents' names are unknown. After witnessing a murder, Bridget becomes the target of a hired assassin. After the apparent suicide of her sister Siobhan, Bridget takes her identity to protect herself, but soon she discovers that her life as Siobhan is far from safe as well. She was born on September 30th, 1979. She is portrayed bySarah Michelle Gellar. Bridget Kelly worked as a stripper in the same nightclubBodaway Macawiruns his mob business. She was estranged from her twin sisterSiobhan Martin, after her involvement inSean's accident. In the show's flashbacks we see Bridget had abused alcohol and drugs in the past, much to the annoyance of her sister who was always cleaning up her messes. Despite their strained relationship, it has been evident in the past and present that Bridget always cared for Siobhan, possibly more than Siobhan did about Bridget.

characters.name: Catherine
characters.description: Catherineis the ex-wife ofAndrew Martinand the mother ofJuliet. She comes to New York to cause trouble for the Martin family. Andrew cheated on her by datingSiobhanwhile they were married. She is portrayed byAndrea Roth. She andAndrewwere married, while Andrew cheated on her withSiobhan,that was mentioned inA Whole New Kind of Bitch. In the beginning of that episode,Julietarrived back to New York City after she went to Miami to spend time with her mother. She said that without Siobhan: Andrew and Catherine could have a chance to work things out, which didn't happen,because instead,Andrew cheated on her with Siobhan.She was mentioned many times. She was behind the plan that involvedMr. Carpenter,Tessa,andJuliet.

characters.description: Chaseis a student atZachary Secor High Schooland a friend, as well as classmate, ofJuliet's. He was the one that told her of the attack and robbery allegedly committed byMr. CarpenteronTessainWhores Don't Make That Much.

characters.description: Daniel Eknathis one ofBodaway Macawi's mobsters. His DNA was found on cigarette butts thatAgent Machadofound on floor of the parking lot.

characters.description: Detective Saldanaworks as a detective.Her first appearance is The Poor Kids Do It Everyday.Her last appearance may be That's What You Get For Trying To Kill Me. She is portrayed by Emily Swallow.

characters.name: Dylan Morrison
characters.description: Dylan Morrisonwas onceSiobhan Martin's boyfriend and the father of her sonSean. He abandoned Siobhan when she became pregnant; years later, he tried to work his way back into Sean's life, but Siobhan wanted nothing more to do with him. Siobhan's twin sisterBridget, who looked after Sean at their house while Siobhan was working, was more sympathetic, and allowed Dylan to take Sean (and herself) to a fair against Siobhan's stated wishes. On their way back, another car slammed into theirs because its driver had fallen asleep at the wheel. Sean was killed and Bridget's arm was injured. Siobhan never forgave either Bridget or Dylan for their roles in Sean's accidental death. Dylan stayed away from the funeral. Sometime after the accident, a group of thugs, likely hired by Siobhan, assaulted Dylan and told him to get out of Tahoe. Seven years later, Dylan lives in Jersey, is married, and has a young daughter. Siobhan has flowers sent to his mother's home annually. When Bridget (posing as Siobhan), visits Dylan's mother, Dylan is alarmed and confronts "Siobhan" in the Martins' apartment complex. Bridget later follows him to his house, sees his happy family, and is overcome with anger; she nearly throws a brick through his window, but is stopped byMalcolm Ward. After a heart-felt talk with Malcolm, Bridget decides to, posing as "Siobhan", tell Dylan that she forgives him. He is portrayed byMisha Collins.

characters.name: Gemma Butler
characters.description: Gemma Butler(néeArbogast) wasSiobhan's best friend and also appeared to be a friend ofAndrew's. She was married toHenry Butlerwith whom she had 3-year-old twin boys, Dash and Becks. Her father,Tim Arbogast, is extremely and famously wealthy. She is portrayed byTara Summers. Gemma was always suspicious of herhusband, thinking he was cheating on her. She confides inShivetteabout her thoughts. A drunk Gemma confrontsOliviaat a party and causes a scene. She later realizes that Olivia was not having an affair with her husband.

characters.name: Greer Sheridan
characters.description: Greer Sheridanis a friend of Siobhan that is holding a fundraiser atJuliet'sschool. She knows one ofSiobhan'sdeep dark secrets. Some incident put a strain on their relationship. She is portrayed by Madchen Amick.

characters.name: Greer Sheridan
characters.description: Greer Sheridanis a friend of Siobhan that is holding a fundraiser atJuliet'sschool. She knows one ofSiobhan'sdeep dark secrets. Some incident put a strain on their relationship. She is portrayed by Madchen Amick.

characters.name: Gregory Harrison
characters.description: Gregory Harrisonplays the role asTim Arbogast,who is Gemma's father, onRinger. He was discovered on a musical theater stage and has been on shows likeCSI: NY,Law and Order: Special Victims Unit,Reunion, andJoey.

characters.name: Gregory Harrison
characters.description: Gregory Harrisonplays the role asTim Arbogast,who is Gemma's father, onRinger. He was discovered on a musical theater stage and has been on shows likeCSI: NY,Law and Order: Special Victims Unit,Reunion, andJoey.

characters.name: Henry Butler
characters.description: Henry ButlerisGemma's husband who had an affair withSiobhan. He and Gemma have 2 kids together, Dash and Becks. He is an author in the middle of writing a novel. His marriage is on the rocks, as Gemma suspects he is cheating on her with someone, though she doesn't know who. After learning that Siobhan is pregnant, he believes it is his child. Finally, after Shivette tells him its over, he accepts that and says "If that makes you happy, then its over". Of course,Gemmaoverhears this conversation and leaves Shivette's birthday party. He is portrayed byKristoffer Polaha.

characters.name: Henry Butler
characters.description: Henry ButlerisGemma's husband who had an affair withSiobhan. He and Gemma have 2 kids together, Dash and Becks. He is an author in the middle of writing a novel. He is portrayed byKristoffer Polaha.

characters.name: Jimmy Kemper
characters.description: Jimmy Kemperis a hired criminal posing as an FBI Agent who is working withVictor Machado. He was sent to watch after inPilothe was sent to look afterBridget Kelly, before she supposedly hit him, took his gun, and escaped. However; it turns out that he was hired bySiobhanandCharlieto to give the gun to Bridget and feign her escape as if she forcefully did it.He is portrayed by Darren Pettie. InThat’s What You Get For Trying To Kill Meit is revealed byMarythat Bodaway Macawi was in touch with somebody called the "Matador", which confuses Agent Machado. After Mary Curtis' death, Jimmy calls Agent Machado, saying that the Matador is inside a warehouse. After they arrive at the empty warehouse they start reminiscing about the time they worked together, when Machado starts relaying clues about how he worked out that Jimmy took down a criminal named "The Bull" and that the name for someone that takes down bulls is a matador. Jimmy pulls a gun on Machado, but Machado had two agents tailing him and Jimmy is arrested to be interrogated, starting with what he knows about Bridget's disappearance.

characters.name: John Delario
characters.description: John Delariowas a man who metBridgetduring their NA meetings and became someone for her to turn to. His alias wasCharlie Youngand he was an ex-cop. He is portrayed byBilly Miller. Charlie meets Shivette at a Narcotic's anonymous meetingwhere they talk about what has happened in their lives. There, he givesShivettea card so they can meet.

characters.description: John Delariowas a man who metBridgetduring their NA meetings and became someone for her to turn to. His alias wasCharlie Youngand he was an ex-cop. characters.name: Juliet Martin
characters.description: Juliet MartinisAndrew's rebellious daughter from his previous marriage toCatherine, which makes herSiobhan's step-daughter. She had a boyfriend, as seen in thefirst episodebut his name is unknown. Juliet was sent to boarding school by her father, which, according to her, was only because of Siobhan. She was then kicked out because of her taking drugs. The relationship between her and Siobhan was really bad, but was presumed to have gotten better sinceShivettecomforted Juliet while she wasn't feeling well and puking in the bathroom (inShe's Ruining Everything), as she is a drug addict, but it has been shown onA Whole New Kind of Bitchthat Juliet doesn't think of Bridget as a "bestie" yet. But at the end of the episode, they may have got along as friends as she helped Shivette clean Siobhan's vandalized portrait. After being moved to public school, she develops a crush on her teacher Mr. Carpenter who she later accuses of rape. During the legal battle, when all seemed lost her classmate Tessa claimed to have also been sexually assaulted by Mr. Capenter which she later confesses was a lie. Upon learning of this, the attorney suggests a settlement with Mr. Carpenter who has counter sued for millions of dollars. After settling it is revealed that it was all a plan devised by Juliet, Tessa and Mr. Carpenter who splits the money from the settlement.

characters.name: Kristoffer Polaha
characters.description:
Kristoffer Caleb "Kris" Polaha(born February 18, 1977) is an American film and television actor who starred on the Fox TV series North Shore. He recently played Nathaniel "Baze" Bazile on the CW series Life Unexpected.
Polaha starred on ABC's mid-season replacement series, Miss Guided, and appeared in the Fox Network television series Tru Calling. Until it was cancelled, he played Nate Bazile, a bar owner who discovers he has a teenage daughter, on the series Life Unexpected.He recently landed the role ofHenry Butleron the CW seriesRingeralongsideSarah Michelle Gellar.

characters.name: Maddie Smithfield
characters.description: Maddie Smithfieldis the lady who works withGemma.Her first appearance wasThe Poor Kids Do It Everyday. She is portrayed byGena Shaw.

characters.name: Maddie Smithfield
characters.description: Maddie Smithfieldis the lady who works withGemma.Her first appearance wasThe Poor Kids Do It Everyday. She is portrayed byGena Shaw.

characters.name: Malcolm Ward
characters.description: Malcolm Wardis a recovering addict who serves asBridget Kelly'sNAsponsor and friend. He is portrayed byMike Colter. Malcolm Ward, an ex-heroin addict and tech professor, was the sponsor and friend of Bridget Kelly. When Bridget runs away, she calls Malcolm, and originally plans to stealSiobhan's moneyand run away together. Malcolm shows a lot of concern for Bridget and agrees to her plans. As he is preparing to go along with Bridget's plan, he is kidnapped byBodaway Macawiand his men. He is tied up in the basement of Club Caged, and drugged because he refused to reveal Bridget's location. Meanwhile, Bridget rings and tells him that the plans have changed, and that the people in Siobhan's life need her.

characters.name: Mary Curtis
characters.description: Mary Curtiswas a stripper and an informant forVictor Machado. She was the only other person that could help lockBodawayup. She was a mother of one and a drug addict. She was friends withBridget Kelly.

characters.name: Maximiliano Hernández
characters.description: MaximilianoplaysDetective Towersin the series,Ringer. He was born in Brooklyn, New York in 1973. He is the middle child (out of three). He started acting in Bishop Ford High School to get out of detention. He also continued acting in college. He has been in movies likeHotel for Dogs,Thor,Pride and Glory, andWarrior.

characters.name: Monica Reynolds
characters.description: Monica Reynoldsis a friend ofJuliet's from her former private high school. Their parents knew one another and they are both wealthy. Monica also likes to party (Oh Gawd, There’s Two Of Them?).She is portrayed byNicole Anderson.
